8 09:30AM - 03:30PM Location Wozniak Lounge, Soda Hall Event type Service Description BearHacks is a day-long event for high-school students, especially those with limited EECS experience, to come to UC Berkeley and simply make something of their own

UC Berkeley and simply make something of their own. A showcase is held at the end of the day, giving attendees the chance to demo their creations to fellow students and parents. Students can choose from one of our starter projects, or work on anythin

om one of our starter projects, or work on anything of their choice; in either case, experienced HKN members will be glad to offer individualized guidance and support throughout the day. Add to iCal | Back to Calendar Eta Kappa Nu, Mu Chapter HOME |
